---
package: "openpipeline_composed"
version: "v0.3.0"
title: "move_anndata_slots"
namespace: "Dataflow"
description: "Move slots (.obs, .var, .obsm, .varm, .obsp, .varp, .uns) from a modality in a source MuData file into a modality in a target MuData file."
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline_composed v0.3.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `move_anndata_slots`  
Namespace: `dataflow`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_composed/tree/v0.3.0/src/dataflow/move_anndata_slots)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_composed)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_composed/v0.3.0/components/dataflow/move_anndata_slots)

:::

The specified slots are copied from the source modality into the target
modality. By default, copying to a key that already exists in the target
raises an error; use --allow_overwrite to overwrite it instead


## Argument groups

### Source

|Name                |Description                                          |Attributes                                 |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input_source`    |Source h5mu file to read slots from.                 |`file`, required, example: `"source.h5mu"` |
|`--source_modality` |Modality in the source h5mu file to read slots from. |`string`, default: `"rna"`                 |


### Target

|Name                |Description                                                                                       |Attributes                                 |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input_target`    |Target h5mu file to write slots into.                                                             |`file`, required, example: `"target.h5mu"` |
|`--target_modality` |Modality in the target h5mu file to write slots into. Defaults to the value of --source_modality. |`string`                                   |


### Slots to move

|Name     |Description                                                                                                         |Attributes                            |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--obs`  |Column names from .obs to move from the source modality to the target modality. If not provided, .obs is not moved. |List of `string`, multiple_sep: `";"` |
|`--var`  |Column names from .var to move from the source modality to the target modality. If not provided, .var is not moved. |List of `string`, multiple_sep: `";"` |
|`--obsm` |Keys from .obsm to move from the source modality to the target modality. If not provided, .obsm is not moved.       |List of `string`, multiple_sep: `";"` |
|`--varm` |Keys from .varm to move from the source modality to the target modality. If not provided, .varm is not moved.       |List of `string`, multiple_sep: `";"` |
|`--obsp` |Keys from .obsp to move from the source modality to the target modality. If not provided, .obsp is not moved.       |List of `string`, multiple_sep: `";"` |
|`--varp` |Keys from .varp to move from the source modality to the target modality. If not provided, .varp is not moved.       |List of `string`, multiple_sep: `";"` |
|`--uns`  |Keys from .uns to move from the source modality to the target modality. If not provided, .uns is not moved.         |List of `string`, multiple_sep: `";"` |


### Options

|Name                |Description                                                                                                                                                                                      |Attributes     |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--allow_overwrite` |Allow overwriting keys that already exist in the target modality. By default, the component raises an error if a key already exists. When enabled, existing keys are overwritten with a warning. |`boolean_true` |


### Output

|Name                   |Description                                                                                                    |Attributes                                 |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--output`             |Output h5mu file (the target with slots added from the source).                                                |`file`, required, example: `"output.h5mu"` |
|`--output_compression` |Compression format to use for the output AnnData and/or Mudata H5 files. By default no compression is applied. |`string`, example: `"gzip"`                |

## Authors


  * Jakub Majercik [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/jakubmajercik) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/jakubmajercik) (author)

## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_composed \
  -r v0.3.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/dataflow/move_anndata_slots/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_composed/v0.3.0/components/dataflow/move_anndata_slots).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_composed \
  -r v0.3.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/dataflow/move_anndata_slots/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).
